seoTitle: Airly vs Airport West — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Airly and Airport West. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Airly vs Airport West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Airly and Airport West.
heading: Airly vs Airport West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Airly, Victoria and Airport West, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Airly has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Airport West (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Airly or Airport West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Airly has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Airport West scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Airly scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Airport West scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Airly or Airport West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Airly has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
